description: Unofficial Morphe patch bundle for supported apps. Includes existing Boost for Reddit hotfixes and Imgur selected media sharing patches. Imgur patches are tested against 7.33.0.0. Boost fixes include v.redd.it video sharing/download audio fix, faster Giphy loading via direct media.giphy.com MP4 fallback, inline Giphy/direct GIF previews in comments, improved inline preview layout/collapse behavior, and completed download notifications on a separate default-importance channel while progress notifications remain low-priority.
